svg.title: Current RAASA observability gap: what 5 scalars miss during an attack
svg.desc: Illustrative diagram showing a pod under a real attack on the left, and the 5 signals RAASA currently collapses that complexity into on the right, revealing what information is lost.

g.text: What actually happens in a real attack
Pod A → Pod B (first-ever edge in graph)
Lateral movement — new comm. graph edge
(byte volume only — no IP entropy, no DNS)
(total rate — no sequence, no which calls)
(count only — no graph, no lateral move)
